app.name: Harness GUI
app.subtitle: Portfolio Console
app.syntheticLoading: Synthetic portfolio loaded while the local service starts.

task.loadingGate: Loading current gate state from the local service.
task.loadingEvidence: Evidence index is loading or unavailable.
task.activePacket: Active task packet indexed from Harness scanner output.
task.blockedPacket: Blocked task. Check findings before continuing.
task.noBlockingFinding: No blocking finding is represented in the index-safe queue state.
task.blockingFinding: Blocking queue present. Inspect findings before confirm.

settings.title: Local-only V1
settings.body: Project registry is local. Global payloads stay index-safe. Raw private files load only on demand in a later gated path.
settings.confirm: Review confirm is preview-only until Harness CLI/core action exists.

empty.title: Select a task
empty.body: Choose a project and queue item to inspect its contract, evidence, and review gate.
